details: Paper kim_2026_2quinolone_synthesis (DOI 10.1021/acsomega.5c13222) Section 4.2.18 states '1,6-Naphthyridin-2(1H)-one (4b). A white solid; mp = 290-291 °C', matching the row exactly.
Dearden 2003 ETC paper (DOI 10.1897/01-363) Table 2 shows '1-Octanol 195.2' in the b.p. (exp.) column.

PMC6236356 (DOI 10.3390/60300267) experimental section: '2-(4-Chlorophenyl)-4,5,11-trihydro-1H[1,2,4]triazepino[7,1-b]quinazolin-11-one (5a).- Prepared from 3d and 4-chlorobenzaldehyde as brown crystals (67%), m.p. 260°C'.
PMC11206691 (DOI 10.3390/molecules29122942): 'Methyl 4-(((1,3-dioxoisoindolin-2-yl)oxy)methyl)benzoate (13)... Pink solid (758.3 mg, 99%). Rf = 0.53 (CH2Cl2), m.p. 155-158 °C'.
PMC12944436 (DOI 10.3390/ph19020198): '4-((Cyclohexyl(methyl)amino)methyl)-N-(4-methyl-3-((4-(pyridin-3-yl)pyrimidin-2-yl)amino)phenyl)benzamide 6a Yield 96%. mp 166-168 °C'.
PMC6146883 (DOI 10.3390/80700541): 'Compound 18 was obtained as pale brown crystals (65%), mp 252°C' for 5-(Coumarin-3/-yl)-1,2,4-triazolo[4,3-a]pyrimidine (18). Prime-folding (3' → 3/) is permitted.
PMC12943719 (DOI 10.3390/molecules31040699): '5-Acetyl-2-ethyl-4-(3-hydroxyphenylamino)-6-phenylpyridazin-3(2H)-one, 2h Yield = 22%; mp = 185-187 °C (EtOH)'.

PMC6146921 Table 8 shows '6. 2-butanol 99.60 102.87 -3.27 -3.28 102.43 (-2.83)' — first numeric column is Bp exp. Row labels as measured experimental value; permitted under schema for QSPR-paper Exp. columns.
PMC6263260 (DOI 10.3390/molecules16053999): 'Stigmasterol (6) White needles; m.p. 155-157 °C'. Paper uses en-dash; row uses hyphen — permitted hyphen folding.
Dearden 2003 ETC review (DOI 10.1897/01-363) Table 2 shows '1-Propanol 97.3' in the b.p. (exp.) column.
kim_2026_2quinolone_synthesis (DOI 10.1021/acsomega.5c13222) Section 4.2.1: 'Quinolin-2(1H)-one (2a). A white solid; m.p. = 191-192 °C'.
PMC6236391 (DOI 10.3390/60900728): '2-Deoxy-2-(5-nitro-2-furamido)-1,3,4,6-tetra-O-acetyl-β-D-glucopyranoside (7): m p 109-111 °C'.

PMC11206253 (DOI 10.3390/molecules29122839) Section 3.7.6: '2-(3-Acetyl-1-(4-bromophenyl)-5-((S)-4-chlorophenyl)-1,2,4-triazolo-4-yl)-2-deoxy-1,3,4,6-tetraacetyl-β-D-glucose (8f)... mp 146-147 °C'. Quote omits the compound name / 8f code.

PMC12937307 (DOI 10.3390/antibiotics15020127): 'Synthesis of N-[(3,5-dimetyl-4-iodo-1H-pyrazol-1-yl)-methyl]-4-fluoroaniline (4a) Yield 88%; mp 144-145 °C; Rf 0.85'. Row uses 'dimethyl' vs paper's typo 'dimetyl'; same compound identity, naming-variation pass. Quote 'Yield 88%; mp 144-145 ◦C; Rf 0.85' omits compound name / 4a code.

PMC11206658 (DOI 10.3390/molecules29122917) Section 3.12: 'N-(2-Bromobenzyl)-N-(3-(4-methoxyphenyl)-1-phenylpropa-1,2-dien-1-yl)acetamide (2e) Yield 84%... white solid; mp 123.5-157.2 °C (CHCl3)'. Unusually wide range but is what the paper reports.
PMC11206731 (DOI 10.3390/molecules29122866): 'O-(methyl)-2-((2-oxopropyl)selanyl)benzoate 12 Yield: 74%; mp 74-75 °C'.
PMC12943640 (DOI 10.3390/ph19020256): 'N-(n-Octylamino)methylenebisphosphonic acid (5) was obtained with a 67% yield; mp. 202 °C'.
PMC6263260 (DOI 10.3390/molecules16053999): 'Macluraxanthone (4) Yellow needles; m.p. 181-182 °C'. Paper uses en-dash; row uses hyphen — permitted hyphen folding.

Krossing/Preiss 2011 (DOI 10.1002/cphc.201100522) Table 1 'Measured melting points [°C]. Te = peak onset, Tp = peak maximum temperature' shows '[N4,4,4,4][BF4] 162.6 164.2 161.8 163.8' — columns First cycle Te, First cycle Tp, Subsequent cycles Te, Subsequent cycles Tp — so 164.2 is First-cycle DSC peak (Tp).

PMC12984852 (DOI 10.3390/ijms27052306) Section 4.1.6: '1-(4-Methylbenzyl)-1,4-dihydroindeno[1,2-b]pirrole-3-carboxilic acid (13)... 13 as a white solid (380 mg, 99.73%), mp = 232-234 °C'. Row preserves paper's typos 'pirrole'/'carboxilic'.

kim_2026_2quinolone_synthesis (DOI 10.1021/acsomega.5c13222) Section 4.2.12: '7-Bromoroquinolin-2(1H)-one (2l). A white solid; mp = 270-272 °C'. Paper has typo 'Bromoroquinolin'; row corrects to '7-Bromoquinolin' — same compound.

gemini_2023_il_surfactants_cu2o (DOI 10.1039/d3ra04646j): '3,3′-(Ethane-1,2-diyl)bis(1-(2-(hexadecyloxy)-2-oxoethyl)-1H-imidazol-3-ium) bromide (4c). Off-white solid, m. p. = 128-130 °C, yield = 67%'.

PMC6193367 (DOI 10.1055/s-0037-1609435): 'Dioctylphosphinic Acid (1f)... mp 83-84 °C' with the matching recrystallization/yield description. Quote begins after the compound-name line and omits 'Dioctylphosphinic Acid' / '1f'.

PMC6146427 (DOI 10.3390/70200189) Table 1 'Thermal Conversion of Imidoyl Azides... Azide dec. temp. (°C)' shows compound 1 (H, Z=Tosyl) — N'-(p-toluenesulfonyl)phenoxycarbimidoyl azide — at decomposition temperature 96 °C.
